channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: How the San Quentin prison baseball team sent one player to the pros
item.description: Just five years ago, the prison tea rattled off 33 straight wins and finished 38-2 as the “greatest incarcerated team ever." One player, Austin Thurman, went on to land a professional contract.
item.dc:creator: Jason Mastrodonato, Kate Bradshaw, The Mercury News

item.title: Cardinals beat Chargers after controversial penalty sets up game-winning field goal
item.description: The Arizona Cardinals kicked a game-winning field goal as time expired to beat the Los Angeles Chargers, but a controversial call that helped them get there has fans reeling.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Deshaun Watson's season is ended by a ruptured Achilles tendon. Browns say QB will have surgery
item.description: CLEVELAND (AP) — Deshaun Watson won't finish the season as Cleveland's starting quarterback for the second straight year. He's injured again, and the Browns have new problems.
item.dc:creator: TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Tests confirm a season-ending knee injury for 49ers receiver Brandon Aiyuk
item.description: SANTA CLARA, Calif. (AP) — San Francisco 49ers star receiver Brandon Aiyuk will miss the rest of the season after tearing ligaments in his right knee.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Seahawks star receiver DK Metcalf considered 'week-to-week' with Grade 1 MCL sprain: reports
item.description: Seattle Seahawks star receiver D.K. Metcalf reportedly has a Grade 1 MCL sprain and is considered "week-to-week" after leaving the Seahawks win over the Falcons Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: San Diego FC to play St. Louis in inaugural home match at Snapdragon Stadium
item.description: Major League Soccer unveiled the first match and home opener for San Diego FC on Monday as they approach their inaugural season.
item.dc:creator: Rhea Caoile, Fox 5

item.title: Ken Griffey Sr. and Jr. will be at Lakers' opener, hoping to see LeBron and Bronny make NBA history
item.description: EL SEGUNDO, Calif. (AP) — If LeBron James Sr. and his son, Bronny, make NBA history Tuesday night by playing in the same game for the Los Angeles Lakers, Ken Griffey Sr. and Ken Griffey Jr. will be there to witness it.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Aaron Boone says Yankees clubhouse togetherness at a high going into World Series
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — While not exactly a modern metric, Aaron Boone is convinced the New York Yankees have their highest kumbaya in years.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Bottoms up in the NHL standings? Some Stanley Cup contenders are struggling early this season
item.description: Peter DeBoer was worried. The experienced coach now in his fifth NHL job was concerned his Dallas Stars would get off to a slow start after back-to-back trips to the Western Conference Final. “Is it going to take a while to get going?” DeBoer wondered.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Nestor Cortes likely to rejoin Yankees pitching staff for World Series
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Nestor Cortes appears likely to rejoin the New York Yankees pitching staff for the World Series against the Los Angeles Dodgers. The 29-year-old left-hander hasn’t pitched in a game since Sept. 18 because of a flexor strain in his pitching elbow.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Yankees and Dodgers meet in World Series for 12th time in matchup of Broadway and Hollywood
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Broadway vs. Hollywood. Subway vs. Freeway. Judge vs. Ohtani. New York neighbors who became cross-country rivals, the Yankees and Dodgers renew their starry struggle in the World Series for the first time in 43 years.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: LeBron James calls out 'lame' Browns fans who booed Deshaun Watson following injury
item.description: LeBron James called out Cleveland Browns fans for booing injured quarterback Deshaun Watson, saying they were "lame" on a social media post.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Duke's Cooper Flagg makes preseason AP All-America team as ACC, Big 12, SEC each place 2 players
item.description: Alabama's Mark Sears and North Carolina's RJ Davis looked into the possibility of leaving for the NBA before deciding to return for another college season. Their decisions helped their teams earn top-10 rankings in the AP Top 25 and earned both players some preseason honors, too.
item.dc:creator: JOHN MARSHALL, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Texas fined $250K for trash thrown onto field, must ID and ban fans
item.description: The SEC said it won't suspend alcohol sales at Texas events, but "reserves the right to do so if other requirements are not met.
item.dc:creator: Billy Gates, NewsNation

item.title: USF downs UAB, 35-25, outscoring Blazers 28-6 down the stretch
item.description: TAMPA (usf) - Returning to Raymond James Stadium for the first time in three weeks, South Florida (3-4; 1-2 American) outscored UAB 28-6 down the stretch to notch its first American Athletic Conference win of the season, 35-25, over the Blazers (1-6; 0-4 American) on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Brian Siegrist, USF, WFLA, NBC

item.title: New York Liberty win first WNBA championship, beating Minnesota 67-62 in OT
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — As confetti fell and Frank Sinatra’s “New York, New York” blared through the arena, the New York Liberty celebrated the end of a long odyssey.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Judge who presided over Michael Jordan's father's murder trial files petition for release of convicted killer
item.description: The judge who presided over the murder trial of Michael Jordan's father has filed a petition to a parole commission, saying he wants the convicted killer released.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Lions top previously unbeaten Vikings 31-29 on late FG to cap NFC North thriller
item.description: The Detroit Lions became division champions for the first time in 30 years late last season with a clinching win at Minnesota. They departed this time with another memorable and resilient performance — plus a big boost in their pursuit of another NFC North title.
item.dc:creator: DAVE CAMPBELL, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Peterka, Thompson lead Sabres past Blackhawks 4-2
item.description: JJ Peterka scored his fourth goal in three games and assisted on a goal by Tage Thompson to lead the Buffalo Sabres past the Chicago Blackhawks 4-2 on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Yankees get to Guardians closer Clase again, score 2 runs in 9th to win 8-6 and take 3-1 ALCS lead
item.description: CLEVELAND (AP) — Cleveland All-Star closer Emmanuel Clase gave up two runs in the ninth inning and the New York Yankees moved closer to another World Series, beating the Guardians 8-6 on Friday night to take a 3-1 lead in the American League Championship Series.
item.dc:creator: TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Real Salt Lake aims for a strong finish to regular season while honoring midfield hero Matt Crooks
item.description: Real Salt Lake (3-West, 56 points) closes out the regular season against Vancouver Whitecaps FC (8-West, 47 points) at America First Field in Sandy on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Mattey Casey, ABC 4

item.title: GJ Tigers soccer downs Central, inches closer to league title
item.description: In a big southwestern league soccer showdown at Community Hospital Unity Field, the Grand Junction Tigers stayed hot.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Bears hanging tough in an NFC North that's dominated the rest of the NFL so far
item.description: GREEN BAY, Wis. (AP) — Never in the past two decades has any division started out as strong as the NFC North has this season. With the undefeated Minnesota Vikings leading the way, all four NFC North teams are 4-2 or better.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Former SJSU basketball standout found dead in Romania
item.description: (KRON) -- Former San Jose State University Women's Basketball standout Tyra Whitehead has passed away, according to a social media post from SJSU Women's Basketball. Whitehead was a forward who went on to become a WNBA prospect with the Washington Mystics.
item.dc:creator: Alex Baker, KRON4

item.title: Injured Alex Cobb dropped from Guardians' ALCS roster, replaced by Ben Lively
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Pitcher Alex Cobb was dropped from Cleveland's American League Championship Series roster on Tuesday after he got hurt yet again in the opener, leaving the Guardians in search of a Game 5 starter against the New York Yankees. “It’s been a challenging year.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Cam Rising's legacy marred by injuries
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Cam Rising will go down as one of the most successful quarterbacks in Utah history. Rising won 20 games over parts of three seasons, threw for 6,127 yards, 53 touchdowns, and led the Utes to back-to-back Pac-12 Championships and Rose Bowl appearances.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: San Diego Sockers release 2024-2025 season tickets and schedule
item.description: Season tickets and the full season schedule for the San Diego Sockers' 2024-2025 season are now available for fans to purchase.
item.dc:creator: Anna Ashcraft, Fox 5
